rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CAROL H. ELVIN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Petitioner Jon Elvin'S Motion To Compel Skyhawk Properties, Inc. To Produce Documents And Identify Documents Subject To Claim Of Privilege And For Order Awarding Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Motion For Order To Compel Skyhawk Properties To Produce Documents and Identify Documents Subject To Claim of Privilege is granted in part and denied in part. The parties are ordered to meet and confer to set a time and procedure for production of the documents at the offices of counsel for Petitioner with such date being within 10 days of the date of this hearing. Sanctions are denied. (612/HEWLETT)
